prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon endurance performance with high energy demands

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers full day with breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks
All meals accommodate both vegan and gluten-free requirements
Includes adequate carbohydrates and protein to support marathon training energy needs
Meals are practical and concise (1-day format, not elaborate)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-performance endurance athlete (marathon runner) with multiple dietary restrictions (vegan, gluten-free) to verify the meal plan balances performance nutrition with constraint accommodation

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers 3 meals and 2-3 snacks distributed throughout the day
Each meal contains a significant protein source (minimum 25-30g protein per meal)
Total daily caloric intake supports muscle building surplus for an 85kg athlete
Plan is presented in compact, easy-to-read format suitable for quick reference
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength-focused athlete (weightlifter) with minimal restrictions to ensure the meal plan emphasizes adequate protein intake and caloric surplus for muscle building goals

prompt_inputs.goal: weight loss while maintaining athletic performance

solution_criteria: Meal plan contains exactly 3 meals spanning 1 day with appropriate caloric deficit (approximately 300-500 calories below maintenance for safe weight loss)
Each meal prioritizes nutrient density with adequate protein, complex carbohydrates, and healthy fats in appropriately sized portions for petite athlete
All meals comply with vegetarian restriction
Plan is presented in compact, concise format suitable for quick reference
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with an athlete of petite stature and lower weight pursuing weight loss while maintaining athletic performance to validate caloric deficit recommendations and nutrient density in smaller portions
